passives.desc:
Turn End: if this unit is Panicked, reset SP to 0

When recovering from Panic: at the next Turn Start, heal SP by this unit's missing HP (max 30)
passives.name: Panic Recovery

passives.desc: This unit's Panic Type does not change when inflicted with an effect that changes Panic Types. Instead, this unit is inflicted with an effect that is inflicted against Non-SP Units.
passives.name: Fixed Panic

passives.desc:
Take -30% damage from [Combustion], [Laceration], [Vibration], [Burst], and [Sinking]

When flipping a Coin that consumes [BulletPropellant]: while not having [BulletPropellant] does not cancel this unit's attacks, the Coin's "inflict [Combustion]" and "inflict [Combustion] Count" effects do not activate

In a Clash, inflict +(1 + (# of Clashes / 3)) [Vibration] Count
(max 3; 3 times per turn against the same target)
passives.name: The Thumb's Officer, Capo IIII

passives.desc:
At Encounter Start, and at the Turn Start of gaining a new pattern:
- Gain 1 [Bothersome]
- Heal 5 SP for every 10% missing HP on self (max 40)
passives.name: Ten Blades of the East

passives.desc:
Turn Start: inflict 1 [Prey] against the target that dealt the most damage to this unit last turn

After Lei Heng attacks the target with [Prey], if the target is:
- Staggered, all enemies lose 10 SP and gain 1 [ParryingResultDown] for this turn and next turn (once per turn)
- Defeated, activate the above effect once more
passives.name: Chosen Prey

passives.desc:
Unopposed Attacks deal +30% damage On Hit and inflict 1 [Vulnerable] next turn

Skill Coins that spent [BulletPropellant] deal +20% damage On Hit and inflict 2 [DefenseDown] next turn

The above effects do not activate if the target equipped a Defense Skill
passives.name: Tiantui Star's Blade [天退星刀]

passives.desc: If this unit used a powerful attack ('Tanglecleaver' or 'Savage Tigerslayer's Perfected Flurry of Blades'), gain [Complacency] next turn equal to the number of times those skills were used (max 5)
passives.name: Tiantui Star's Blade - Overheat

passives.desc:
Combat Start: based on this unit's Speed value,
- Heal SP equal to Speed value. At less than 0 SP, double the heal amount
- Gain (Speed Value / 3) [SlashDamageUp] (max 5)

Encounter Start: if this unit has 3+ [Binding], the above effect does not activate; gain [DefenseDown] equal to [Binding] on self (max 9)
passives.name: Chachihu [揷翅虎]

passives.desc:
Turn End: at 90% or less HP, or at the end of the 2nd turn, reload [BulletPropellant] and gain a new pattern next turn
- If this unit is Staggered, recover from Stagger
passives.name: Tigermark Round Reload

passives.desc:
Turn End: at 80% or less HP, or at the end of the 4th turn, gain a new pattern next turn
- Use a powerful attack ('Tanglecleaver'), repeat every 3rd turn. +10 to Min & Max Speed for turns in which this unit uses this Skill
- At the start of that turn, gain 25 [BattleSense]
- If this unit is Staggered, recover from Stagger
passives.name: Lei Heng [雷橫]

passives.desc:
If this unit's HP dropped to 60% or below at Turn End, or if this unit is set to use a powerful attack ('Tanglecleaver') next turn for the second time this Encounter, gain a new pattern next turn
- When that turn starts, gain 1 [Irritation]
- When that turn starts, gain 18 [BulletPropellantSpecial] and reload immediately
· If this unit spends all [BulletPropellantSpecial], convert the effect to [BulletPropellant] and summon 2 of "Stern Soldato of the Thumb" units next turn and have them supply this unit with [BulletPropellantSpecial]
- When Staggered, recover from Stagger
passives.name: Tiantui Star [天退星]

passives.desc:
Turn End: at 40% or less HP, or if this unit is set to use a powerful attack ('Tanglecleaver') next turn for the third time this Encounter, gain a new pattern next turn
- Replace the powerful attack 'Tanglecleaver' with 'Savage Tigerslayer's Perfected Flurry of Blades'. +15 to Min & Max Speed for turns in which this unit uses this Skill
- Convert [BattleSense] to [RestoredBattleSense]
- Convert [Irritation] to [DerivativeHugeIrritation]
- If this unit is Staggered, recover from Stagger
passives.name: Lei Heng, The Pinky's Tiantui Star

skills.desc: Final Power +1 for every 4 ([Combustion] + [Vibration]) on target (max 2)
skills.name: Double Slash

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1

skills.desc: Final Power +1 for every 4 ([Combustion] + [Vibration]) on target (max 2)
skills.name: Triple Slash

skills.desc:
Final Power +1 for every 4 ([Combustion] + [Vibration]) on target (max 4)
[DefeatDuel] Lose 1 [BulletPropellant]
skills.name: Double Slash - Blast [爆]

descs: [UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion] twice; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 2

skills.desc:
Final Power +1 for every 4 ([Combustion] + [Vibration]) on target (max 4)
[DefeatDuel] Lose 1 [BulletPropellant]
skills.name: Triple Slash - Blast [爆]

descs: If this unit spent [BulletPropellant] due to this Coin's effect, deal +50% damage
[UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion] twice; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 2

skills.desc:
Prioritizes targets with [Prey]
Can clash with this Skill regardless of Speed
Coin Power +1 for every 6 ([Combustion] + [Vibration]) on target (max 3)
[DefeatDuel] Deal -50% final damage
skills.name: Blasting Shatterslash [爆碎斬]

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Inflict [Combustion], [Combustion] Count, [Vibration], and [Vibration] Count by [BulletPropellant] spent
[UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion] 3 times; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 3

skills.desc:
Prioritizes targets with [Prey]
Can Clash with this Skill regardless of Speed; this unit does not become Staggered before it uses this Skill
[WhenUse] Consume all [BattleSense] Stack on self. If this unit consumed...
- ... 10+ Stack , gain Atk Weight +1 for every 10 Stack consumed (max 2)
- ... 25 Stack, Final Power +1 for every 4 (sum of [Combustion] and [Vibration] on the main target) (max 5)
[DefeatDuel] Deal -80% damage; this Skill's damage cannot Stagger the target; inflict only half the Potency and Count for both [Combustion] and [Vibration] inflicted by this Skill (unless raised by other effects)
[EndSkill] [FullReload] (once per turn)
- If this unit has [BulletPropellantSpecial], [ReloadKeepAmmo] instead (once per turn)
[DefeatDuel] Deal -50% final damage
[EndSkill] Ends this turn
skills.name: Tanglecleaver [快刀亂麻]

descs: [UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion] 5 times; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 5

skills.desc:
Prioritizes targets with [Prey]
Can Clash with this Skill regardless of Speed; this unit does not become Staggered before it uses this Skill
[WhenUse] Consume all [BattleSense] Stack on self. If this unit consumed...
- ... 10+ Stack , gain Atk Weight +1 for every 10 Stack consumed (max 4)
- ... 25 Stack, Final Power +1 for every 4 (sum of [Combustion] and [Vibration] on the main target) (max 6)
- ... 50 Stack, Coin Power +1 and deal +50% damage
[DefeatDuel] Deal -80% damage; this Skill's damage cannot Stagger the target; inflict only half the Potency and Count for both [Combustion] and [Vibration] inflicted by this Skill (unless raised by other effects)
[EndSkill] [FullReload] (once per turn)
- If this unit has [BulletPropellantSpecial], [ReloadKeepAmmo] instead (once per turn)
[DefeatDuel] Deal -50% final damage
[EndSkill] Ends this turn
skills.name: Savage Tigerslayer's Perfected Flurry of Blades [超絕猛虎殺擊亂斬]

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Heal 10 SP
- At less than 0 SP, heal 5 additional SP
[DuelCounter]
[DefeatDuel] Lose 1 [BulletPropellant]
[EndSkill] [FullReload] (once per turn)
- If this unit has [BulletPropellantSpecial], [ReloadKeepAmmo] instead (once per turn)
skills.name: Reloading Tiantui Star's Blade

passives.desc:
Turn Start: gain 5 [Vulnerable]
Turn End: supply [BulletPropellantSpecial] to Lei Heng

If this unit is killed, this unit cannot supply [BulletPropellantSpecial] for Lei Heng; Lei Heng gains 1 [Vulnerable] and 1 [ParryingResultDown] next turn
passives.name: Savage Tigermark Support

skills.desc:
[EndBattle] If this unit survives, give 6 [BulletPropellantSpecial] to Lei Heng
[EndBattle] [DisengageCombat]
skills.name: Savage Tigermark Support
